title: Review round 1: yh4 Blob support
description: Review of blob upload/download/sha256/Blob2 implementation for epic yh4.
notes: Maintainer risk: MEDIUM. Five burden issues filed. Two are API surface problems (expand_url_template pub, download_blob missing {type} parameter) that will need breaking changes if addressed later. Two are internal consistency issues (blob_lookup bypasses build_request, compute_sha256_hex uppercase/lowercase contradiction) that will cause silent drift as the codebase evolves. One is a type ergonomics issue (not_found Option vs Vec) that forces boilerplate at every call site. None are correctness bugs. The code is readable and well-documented but the blob module was added with slightly different conventions from the rest of methods/.
